scripts.install:all: npm install && cd Backend && npm install && cd ../Frontend && npm install
scripts.dev:clean: powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173,8081 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npm run dev"
scripts.build:all: cd Backend && npm run build && cd ../Frontend && npm run build
